name: Power & Digital Infrastructure Acquisition II Corp. Warrant
summary: Power & Digital Infrastructure Acquisition II Corp. is a blank check company formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. Each warrant entitles the holder to purchase one share of Class A common stock at a price of $11.50 per share. The company is based in Menlo Park, California.
